tasks.title: Unblock Tower delegation and curate initial session state
tasks.objective: Restore Codex authentication so Tower can delegate the queued Scribe curation packet and establish a non-bootstrap operational baseline.
tasks.next_action: Re-authenticate this Codex environment, rerun `.control-tower/packets/outbox/scribe-initial-session-state.json`, then run `tower-run sync-memory`.
blockers: Codex auth refresh failed with `refresh_token_reused`, preventing `tower-run delegate` from producing specialist results.
open_questions: What does the imported user goal `auth` refer to in this repo?
